title: Corellian Security Force
content:
{{Top|canon=Corellian Security Forces}} {{Otheruses|Corellian}} {{MultipleIssues|expand|updatecontent=[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]], [[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]], [[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]}} {{Youmay|the Corellian Security Force|CorpSec, an abbreviation for the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]|linebreak=1}} {{Organization |image=[[File:CorSec_Investigator.jpg]] |name=Corellian Security Force |type=[[Law enforcement agency/Legends|Law enforcement agency]]{{CSWECite|I|143|Corellian Security Force (CorSec)}} |founder= |leader=*[[Director/Legends|Director]]''[[Suns of Fortune]]'' *[[Commissioner/Legends|Commissioner]] {{C|Formerly}}{{TORcite|type=class|Bounty Hunter|The Thin Blue Line|Corellia}} |subgroup=*[[Animal Control Division]]{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Lamproid Smugglers: a Messy Bunch}} *[[CorSec Intelligence]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' *[[Smuggling Interdiction Division]]''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]'' *[[CorSec Special Operations|Special Operations]]''[[X-Wing: The Bacta War]]'' *[[Tactical Response Team]]''[[X-Wing: Rogue Squadron]]'' |headquarters=[[One CorSec Plaza/Legends|CorSec Headquarters]], [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]], [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] |locations=[[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]] |formed= |founded=Prior to [[3660 BBY]]{{SWArchive|url=games/videgames/tor_smugglersvanguard/index.html|text=''The Old Republic: Smuggler's Vanguard''|int=The Old Republic: Smuggler's Vanguard}}''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' |fragmented= |reorganized= |dissolved=[[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' |restored=Prior to [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] |affiliation=*[[Corellian republic]]''[[Hero's Guide]]'' *[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]{{TORcite|type=codex|Corellian Security Force (CorSec)}} *[[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] *[[Five Worlds]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' *[[Confederation]]''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' }} {{Quote|Come with me, please, I need to ask you a few questions.|Unidentified CorSec Investigator|{{SWGTCG|set=Threat of the Conqueror|scenario=''The Skulls'' promotional scenario}}}} The '''Corellian Security Force''', commonly abbreviated '''CorSec''', was the primary [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agency]] of the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. CorSec was famous for its impressive success rate that relied on the great efficiency of its personnel. CorSec officers were well know for their probity and cleverness combined to their advanced training and their dedication to work. They rarely allowed criminals to roam around long enough to cause any harm on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. CorSec had an impressive arrest and conviction record and was among the finest law enforcement officials in the galaxy. The Corellian Security Force ensured security and maintained order in the Corellian system for more than three thousand years, being only briefly replaced by the [[Public Safety Service]] late in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. ==Description== {{Quote|We have our moments.|[[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]]|''[[I, Jedi]]''}} The Corellian Security Force was the primary [[Law enforcement agency/Legends|law enforcement agency]] for the [[Corellian system/Legends|Corellian system]]. It acted as a semi-autonomous organization: although CorSec was ostensibly under control of the Corellian chief of state, CorSec officers often acted independently from the Corellian government. CorSec operated predominantly on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]] but its jurisdiction extended also over certain parts of the Corellian system. Its authority extended over municipal and regional police forces, giving to CorSec a coordinating role. This span of operation allowed CorSec to maintain a coordinated law enforcement system throughout the star system, while reducing the bureaucracy involved in far-ranging investigations. Hence, Corellian Security was assigned to investigations that spanned over multiple local jurisdictions. The Corellian Security Force was recognized as one of the most efficient police agencies in the galaxy and was widely seen as a standard for planetary security. [[File:CorSec_investigator-SoF.png|thumb|left|150px|A CorSec officer]] Members of CorSec were renowned for their loyalty and dedication to justice. The bulk of the Corellian Security Force was made of [[Police officer/Legends|police officers]] known as CorSec officers. They were hard-workers who performed general policing and peacekeeping jobs, such as walking beats in neighborhoods, patrolling and monitoring traffic on the ground and in the air, writing tickets, performing community outreach and arresting scofflaws, without any kind of recognition from fellow Corellians. There was a false, but persistent, myth that all CorSec officers were given quotas of traffic tickets to hand out.[[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] Beyond standard police officers, the Corellian Security Force also strongly relied on [[Detective/Legends|investigators]], responsible for investigating criminal cases. These investigators were trained to think analytically and base decisions and assumptions on the most facts available. If necessary, they might even work under-cover to assess a situation or retrieve information that might be critical to solving the case. In addition, CorSec also employed [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]], [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]],{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=CorSec Soldier}} [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] and personnel specialized in diverse fields such as computer science, diplomacy, and infiltration. New recruits were trained at the [[Corellian Security Force Academy|CorSec Academy]] where they received advanced training.{{SWGTCG|set=Threat of the Conqueror|cardname=CorSec Academy}} CorSec members could advance and attain the [[Police rank|ranks]] of [[Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]],{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Destroy 10 Battle Droids|Corellia}} [[Master Sergeant/Legends|master sergeant]],{{SWGTCG|set=Agents of Deception|cardname=CorSec Master Sergeant}} [[Chief/Legends|chief]],{{SWGTCG|set=Threat of the Conqueror|cardname=CorSec Chief}} [[technical officer]],{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Reactivate the Communication Antenna|Corellia}} [[Lieutenant/Legends|lieutenant]],{{SWGTCG|set=Squadrons Over Corellia|cardname=Mack Jasper}} [[Captain/Legends|captain]],{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=CorSec Captain}} [[Major/Legends|major]],{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=CorSec Major}} and [[Commissioner/Legends|commissioner]].{{SWGTCG|set=Threat of the Conqueror|cardname=CorSec Commissioner}} Such promotions usually resulted from the efforts and capacities of the officers rather than political nomination. The Corellian Security Force was originally headed by a commissioner, and later by a [[Director/Legends|director]]. Members of the Corellian Security Force took pride in their ability to keep Corellia safe. [[File:CorSec_Major.jpg|thumb|right|220px|A CorSec major]] The Corellian Security Force was organized in several services and divisions such as the [[Smuggling Interdiction Division]], the [[CorSec Intelligence]] service, the [[Animal Control Division]], the [[Tactical Response Team]] and the [[Special Operations Unit]]. The Tactical Response Team was an elite paramilitary unit that carried CoSec's most dangerous missions. The Special Operations specialized in penetrating criminal organizations and dismantling them from inside. CorSec also provided [[Bodyguard/Legends|bodyguard]] services for Corellian government figures and [[Senator/Legends|senators]].{{HoloNetNewsWeb|47|news/13314_1.html|Corellia Closes Borders}} [[File:CorSec_HQ_Interior.png|thumb|left|250px|The CorSec Headquarters]] The Corellian Security Force was [[One CorSec Plaza/Legends|headquartered]] at One [[CorSec Plaza/Legends|CorSec Plaza]], in [[Coronet City/Legends|Coronet City]], the capital of Corellia. Other major CorSec facilities such as the [[Corellian Security Force Academy]] and the [[CorSec Maximum Security Prison]] were also located in Coronet.{{TORcite|type=faction|Republic|Reclamation|Corellia}}{{TORcite|type=heroic|Prison Busting|Corellia}} CorSec operated [[SurvNet]], a network of [[Security camera/Legends|security cameras]] throughout Coronet City. Beyond Corellia and other Corellian worlds, the Corellian Security Force was also present in the Corellian space. The police force used [[Starship/Legends|starships]] to patrol the system and operated several space stations, such as the [[Corellia Space Station]],''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Jump to Lightspeed]]'' the [[CorSec Outpost]]''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Rage of the Wookiees]]'' and the [[Corellia Orbital Station]]. Such stations were used to monitor trafic and control access to Corellia. CorSec also protected, along with the [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]], the strategic [[Corellian Engineering Corporation/Legends|CEC]] [[CEC shipyards|shipyards]].''[[Coruscant and the Core Worlds]]'' ===Equipment=== CorSec personnel made used of a wide variety of equipment. CorSec officers traditionally wore emerald and black uniforms. During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], most CorSec officers wore [[CorSec Mk. IV armored vest]]s. They also made use of [[Type III "Berethron" Personal Modular Armor/Legends|Type III "Berethron" Personal Modular Armor]]s and [[HuntSuit|Corellian HuntSuit]]s.''[[Gundark's Fantastic Technology: Personal Gear]]'' The most commonly known weapon used by CorSec were [[CDEF blaster pistol]]s, [[HL-27 light blaster pistol]]s, [[H-7 "Equalizer" blaster pistol/Legends|H-7 "Equalizer" blaster pistols]], [[Deck Sweeper Stunning Blaster]]s, [[CDEF carbine]]s,{{SWGTCG|set=The Nightsister's Revenge|cardname=CorSec CDEF Carbine}} [[E-11 blaster rifle/Legends|E-11 blaster rifles]]{{SWGTCG|set=Threat of the Conqueror|cardname=CorSec E-11 Rifle}} as well as [[Stun baton/Legends|electrobatons]],{{TORcite|type=item|CorSec Electrobaton|the Cartel Market}} [[Vibroknife/Legends|vibroknives]] and [[Sword/Legends|swords]].{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force (SWGTCG)|cardname=CorSec Sword}} CorSec also used devices such as [[Autoscan Weapons Detector]]s{{JournalCite|4|Cracken's Rebel Field Guide: Scanners}} and [[DimSim]]s. [[File:Corran_Horn_X-wing.jpg|thumb|right|220px|A CorSec X-wing]] The Corellian police force also owned a a large variety of [[Security droid/Legends|security droids]], [[Probe droid/Legends|probe droids]] and [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]],''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' including [[sonic generator droid]]s The Corellian Security Force owned various vehicles such as [[D-22 "Screamer" speeder bike]]s, [[Seraph-class urban landspeeder|''Seraph''-class urban landspeeders]], [[CAV-11 "Condor" airspeeder]]s, and [[TIE crawler/Legends|century tanks]]. During space missions, CorSec pilots primary flew [[Light Attack Fighter Model 250|LAF-250 starfighters]]. Additionally, they also used [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|T-65 X-wing starfighters]], [[CL-1c Lancet interceptor]]s, [[Z-95-AF4 Headhunter/Legends|Z-95-AF4 Headhunters]], [[RZ-1 A-wing interceptor/Legends|RZ-1 A-wing interceptors]], [[Firespray-31-class patrol and attack craft/Legends|Firespray-31-class patrol and attack crafts]] and [[Ye-4 gunship]]s.{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|Deliver Hutt Cargo|Dantooine system}} The Corellian Security also made use of larger starships such as [[PB-950 patrol boat]]s, [[YV-330 light freighter]]s,{{GamerCite|2|A Legacy of Starships}} and [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvettes]].{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=heroic|Corellian Corvette}}''[[Beyond the Rim]]'' CorSec maintained a large [[CorSec criminal database|criminal database]]. ==History== ===Old Republic era=== During the time of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], officers of the Corellian Security Force were reputed for their loyalty to the Republic. CorSec alumni were often chosen to become members of the [[Senate Guard/Legends|Republic Guard]] of the [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]]. ====Galactic War==== [[File:CorSec_SWTOR.jpg|thumb|right|280px|CorSec troops during the [[Battle of Corellia]]]] {{Quote|No one expected the transition to be easy. But the Republic turned some minor resistance into an all-out war.''"
"''The real Corellia rioted in the streets. CorSec launched full-scale attacks on the Empire. There was nothing minor about it.|A member of the [[Corellian Council]] and Councilor [[Belos]]|{{TORcite|type=faction|Republic|Right to Arms|Corellia}}}} During the [[Galactic War]] between the Galactic Republic and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|Sith Empire]], the Imperial forces [[Battle of Corellia|invaded Corellia]] in [[3640 BBY]]. CorSec forces supported the Republic and joined the Corellian resistance against the Imperials.{{TORcite|type=codex|The Corellian Rebellion}} ====Rise of the Empire and Clone Wars==== {{Quote|CorSec's men and women will not be drafted into Republic service, to die on a distant world outside of Corellia's borders. Nor will armed forces from other worlds be billeted in our homes.|Diktat [[Shyla Merricope]]|}} In the last millennium of the Old Republic, CorSec forces battled and destroyed the pirate [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] ''[[Xim's Scion]]''. The wreck of the cruiser was later salvaged as the [[Gus Treta Inner-System Market Station]]. Centuries later, the Gus Treta Inner-System Market Station by the [[Bonestar Pirates]] in an attempt to evade capture by CorSec.''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: The Phantom Affair]]'' In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], Corellia invoked the ''[[Contemplanys Hermi]]'' to withdraw from its obligation towards the Galactic Republic and remained neutral in the incoming [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the Republic and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]]. Consequently, Corellian military and police forces were not authorize anymore to support their Republic counterparts and the Republic was not allowed to request CorSec assistance in any matter. This not prevented CorSec officer [[Rostek Horn]] to help a group of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] to get information against the Confederacy during a [[Mission to Corellia (Clone Wars)|mission on Corellia]] at the beginning of the war.{{InsiderCite|66|Elusion Illusion}} Despite their isolation, the Corellians prepared themselves for an impending attack from the Confederacy after the neighboring world of [[Duro/Legends|Duro]] was [[Battle of Duro (Clone Wars)|conquered]] by the Separatists later during the war. CorSec forces were put at maximum alert throughout the sector, particularly in the protection of the CEC shipyards.{{InsiderCite|75|Republic HoloNet News Core Edition 15:3:02}} Eventually, the Separatist fleet bypassed Corellia when they invaded the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]] and struck directly at [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Talk to Lieutenant Varias in the Corsec camp|Corellia}} At some point, Rostek Horn served as Director of CorSec. ===The Empire and the Galactic Civil War=== {{Quote|CorSec is Corellia's local Security force. As you know, Corellia is officially neutral in the Galactic Civil War... or at least as neutral as a world can be in this day and age. We provide defense and law enforcement for the entire Corellian system.|Sergeant [[Rhea]], to a spacer|{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=conversation|Sergeant Rhea|Corellia}}}} After the [[Declaration of a New Order]], Corellia remained officially independent from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. The [[Diktat]] formally kept its leadership over the [[Corellian sector/Legends|Corellian sector]] and the Corellian military but, in reality, the Diktat and the Corellian government were subjected to the Empire. The Galactic Empire was allowed to operate freely in the system and established a military presence on Corellia. The [[Corellian Defense Force/Legends|Corellian Defense Force]] was maintained but was placed under Imperial control. The Diktat directly assumed the position of Director of CorSec during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. The Corellian Security Force was also maintained but forced to accept the insertion of [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] [[Imperial Liaison|liaison officers]] in every divisions, officially to monitor and coordinate activities with local Imperial garrisons, but in reality to oversee CorSec officers. Hence, the collaboration was rather difficult.''[[X-Wing: The Krytos Trap]]''{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Mobile Hospital Animal Problem}} on Corellia{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Rescue Recon Buddy From Animals}} on Corellia{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Training Ground Has Hostile Quadrupeds}} on Corellia Imperial Officer [[Kirtan Loor]] served in such position in the Smuggling Interdiction Division. Nevertheless, despite its [[Imperialization/Legends|imperialization]], CorSec remained largely intact.{{CSWECite|I|140|Corellia}} [[Alien/Legends|Non-Human]] CorSec officers were among the most affected by the regime change.{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-guide-to-warfare-authors-cut-part-12-tales-of-the-new-republic|series=Star Wars: The Essential Guide to Warfare Author's Cut|text=Part 12: Tales of the New Republic}} During the [[Great Jedi Purge/Legends|Great Jedi Purge]], CorSec resources were used to aid [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]] in tracking down and hunting Jedi. [[File:Corsecuniform.jpg|thumb|left|CorSec officers [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]]]] When the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] between the Galactic Empire and the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] erupted, the situation became more complicated for Corellian Security Force officers. Suddenly, the Empire froze CorSec funds and confiscated large quantities of weapons and starships. CorSec staff was purged, without pension, of officers suspected of sympathy for the Rebellion, often abusively.{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=conversation|(Retired) CorSec Pilot|Corellia}} After the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]], a group of Rebel operatives led by [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] assaulted a CorSec corvette and rescued a [[Rebel pilot/Legends|Rebel pilot]] arrested by CorSec forces following Imperial orders. Around the same time, a CorSec [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttle]] carrying a group of Imperial [[Inspector/Legends|inspectors]] crashed in the Corellian wilderness while heading to a suspected smuggling depot. The crash of the shuttle, that happened just after technicians had completed maintenance, put the police force in a very uncomfortable position. Furthermore, the Corellian Security discovered that the bodies of the Imperial agents were devoured by local scavengers, prompting CorSec to recruit a spacer to hunt the creatures and erase all traces of this terrible fate before the Empire could figure out.{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Situation We Need to Resolve Quietly}} on Corellia Later, in [[1 ABY/Legends|1 ABY]],{{SWG_timeline}} Imperial [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Nial Declann]] requisitioned CorSec [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] pilots to participate in an assault against a Rebel Alliance CR90 corvette in the [[Kessel system/Legends|Kessel system]]. Ironically, the pressure exerted on CorSec officers by the Empire in its hunt for Rebels eventually made some of them rather supportive of the Rebellion. After the Battle of Yavin, [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Mack Jasper|Jasper]] attempted to reclaim the [[Codex of Tython]], a [[Holocron/Legends|Jedi holocron]] wanted by the Rebel Alliance, from an Imperial operative.{{SWGTCG|set=Champions of the Force|scenario=Dark Side scenario campaign}} In [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], a group of CorSec officers directly worked with the Rebel Jedi [[Rachi Sitra]] to investigate the Imperial presence on [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].{{SWGTCG|set=The Price of Victory|cardname=Mission from CorSec}} ====Fighting criminals==== {{Quote|Crime rates have risen all over Corellia lately. It is up to the Corellian Security Forces to find out why.|Captain [[Vitala Baize]], to a spacer|}} During the Galactic Civil War, CorSec officers were encouraged by their Imperial liaisons to neglect their police duties to focus on anti-Rebel operations. The lack of personnel and funding forced CorSec to recruit civilians to carry out minor missions.{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=terminal||Suspected Jump Pirate Lair}} on Corellia Hence, criminality increased on Corellia.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=conversation|Captain Vitala Baize|Corellia}} Moreover, reallocation of Corellian military forces to fight the Rebellion led to a rise of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]] in the Corellian system. The Corellian Security Force had therefore to deal with a large variety of criminals throughout the Corellian system,{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Faction%20Standings|text=Faction Standings}} namely the [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]],"[[Side Trip]]" [[Borvo]] the Hutt,{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Bluffing CorSec|Corellia}} the [[Binayre Pirates]], the [[Afarathu]], the [[Cult of Lord Nyax]], the [[Lost Aqualish]]s, the [[Tralus and Talus Liberation Party]], the [[Monumenters]], [[Unidentified Lamproid smugglers|Lamproid smugglers]], [[the Flail]],{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Corsec vs. Flail Battle|Talus}} [[Jump pirates]], the [[Ragtags]], the [[Deflarians]],{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Legacy Quest: "Let the Buyer Beware" on Corellia the [[Meatlumps]],{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|CorSec Case Files: Assault and Battery|Corellia}} the [[Chirq Council]],{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Legacy Quest: "The Chirq Council: The Elite Council" on Corellia the [[Hidden Daggers]],{{SWGcite|exp=JtL|type=space|Strike a blow to the Hidden Daggers Leadership|Corellian system}} and the [[Followers of Baba]].{{SWGTCG|set=Threat of the Conqueror|scenario=''Followers of Baba'' promotional scenario}} CorSec forces were sometimes assisted by the mercenaries of [[Beldonna's League]]. Furthermore, a large group of CorSec officers deserted during the Galactic Civil War to chose a criminal lifestyle. Those [[Rogue CorSec]] established a [[Rogue CorSec Base|base]] on an island and violently harassed loyal CorSec officers.{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Rogue CorSec Base|Corellia}} The situation was indeed a source of terrible embarrassment for the CorSec.{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=herald|CorSec Agent|Corellia}} In 1 ABY, the CorSec officers resolved several complex cases on Corellia. Lieutenant Jasper revealed a plot arranged by the Rogue CorSec to create a public political-judicial scandal in order to overthrow the Corellian [[Head of State/Legends|Head of State]], the [[Diktat]] [[Daclif Gallamby]], and his government.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Go to the Source of the Remote Signal|Corellia}}{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Receive the Thanks of a Grateful Diktat|Corellia}} [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Joth]] discovered and closed an [[Illegal Lab (Corellia)|illegal lab]] where the crazy scientist [[Doctor/Legends|Doctor]] [[Maldien]] performed dangerous genetic experiments to create dreadful beasts.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Coronet Murmurs: Agents of Destruction|Corellia}}{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Coronet Murmurs: Clear Out the Zoo|Corellia}} [[Inspector/Legends|Inspector]] [[Cora (Human)|Cora]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Jark]] retrieved a cargo of weapons stolen by the [[Deflarians]] and prevented a [[Ragtags|Ragtag]] attack on [[Tyrena/Legends|Tyrena]].{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|What Happened to Donovan?|Corellia}} [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Talte]] rescued hikers kidnapped in the [[Nomad Mountains|Thaos Mountains]] by a group of [[Cave-dwellers|psychotic cave-dwellers]].{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Legacy Quest: "Disappearances: Rescue" on Corellia [[Major/Legends|Major]] [[Alana Walden|Walden]] arrested the retired CorSec hero [[Wilfred Quelsh]] for murdering fellow officer [[Kal Braggan]].{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Legacy Quest: "CorSec Case Files: Stolen Honor" on Corellia [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] [[Lon Cope|Cope]] and [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Vitala Baize|Baize]] discovered the existence of the powerful [[Chirq Council]] and finally disbanded the organization.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=other}}Legacy Quest: "CorSec Case Files: The Unlucky Mayor" on Corellia [[File:Corsec_vs._Flail_Battle.jpg|thumb|right|280px|CorSec troopers battling [[The Flail|Flail]] cutthroats on Talus]] The Corellian Security Force was also very active in other parts of the Corellian system. In 1 ABY, the CorSec localized the [[Flail hideout]] on the planet [[Talus/Legends|Talus]], leading to a [[CorSec vs. Flail Battle|battle]] nearby. Later, [[Agent/Legends|Agent]] [[Taarna]] defeated the [[Talusian Smugglers]] who exploited the [[Selonian/Legends|Selonians]] of the [[Neetha Den]].{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Address the Den Mother|Talus}} Taarna later exposed and canceled the [[Parasophic Arachne]] program, an illegal and dangerous [[Bioengineering/Legends|bioengineering]] project conducted by the [[GeneTech Syndicate]] on Talus in order to create an intelligent and deadly form of [[arachne]]s.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Genocide|Talus}} The same year, Sergeant [[Rhea]]'s pilots engaged and killed and the Hidden Dagger leaders [[Russ Grimblade]], [[Xopw Laow]], [[Mori]] the Bastard, [[Owpa Awoz]] and [[Quixio]] the Rotten in Corellian space. Nevertheless, CorSec operations were not always successful. Around the time of the Battle of Yavin, Black Sun operatives overran the [[Rubicund Eye]], an extra-galactic observatory in the Corellian system. Advanced Black Sun starfighters were able to repel all CorSec attempts to drive them out of the station. On [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]], a CorSec agent, [[Niksel Frangee]], infiltrated in [[Nal Raka Criminal Empire|Borvo the Hutt's criminal organization]] since before the beginning of the Galactic Civil War was uncovered and assassinated. Moreover, [[Borvo's guard|Borvo's bodyguard]] later duped CorSec Captain [[Thale Dustrunner]] and infiltrated his own agent in CorSec on Corellia. Borvo's spy then murdered the CorSec agent [[Maerzen]] and the witness [[Aldalad]]. The same year, in 1 ABY, an assault team led by [[Bruce McBrain]] destroyed a CorSec CR90 corvette that contained evidence against [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]'s [[Jabba's criminal empire/Legends|criminal activities]]. Overall, the most visible manifestation of difficulties for the Corellian Security Force was the total abandonment of the [[Blue Sector/Legends|Blue Sector]] of Coronet City to [[Swoop gang/Legends|swoop gangs]]. [[File:CorSec_droid_factory.jpg|thumb|left|280px|CorSec forces assault IG-88's droid factory]] Later in 1 ABY, the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]] [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88]] discovered a secret Clone Wars-era Separatist [[Corellia Droid Factory|droid factory]] on Corellia and reactivated it as part of his [[Droid Revolution]]. A strike team led by Lieutenant [[Varias]], that included [[Agent/Legends|Agent]] [[Jornel Savas]], [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Hirka]], [[technical officer]] [[Druno Kener]], Sergeant [[Mener]] and CorSec soldiers, was soon dispatched to shut down the factory.{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=class|Legacy|Disable the Droid Factory|Corellia}} In [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]],''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' CorSec officers [[Hal Horn|Hal]] and [[Corran Horn/Legends|Corran Horn]] [[Capture of Zekka Thyne|arrested]] [[Zekka Thyne]], the leader of Black Sun on Corellia. Some times later, Hal Horn was killed by the [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Bossk/Legends|Bossk]]. Corran Horn later captured Bossk but the Trandoshan was eventually set free by Horn's Imperial liaison officer. At this time, the Dirktat did not assumed the position of Director of CorSec anymore. During the Galactic Civil War, CorSec captured the illegally-modified [[GX1 short hauler/Legends|Short Hauler]] ''[[Nova Whisper]]'', up till then property of the [[Privateer/Legends|privateer]] [[Dharus]]. CorSec wanted to use the ship as a bait for criminals and left the customizations on it. The ship was assigned to CorSec's vehicle pool until it was hijacked by its pilot, [[Delt Nerris]].''[[Stock Ships]]'' ===The end of the Empire=== [[File:MissionToCorellia-XWingRogueSquadron27.jpg|thumb|right|280px|Corsec officers assisted [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in the rescue of [[Fyric Fel]]]] After the death of [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] at the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the Galactic Empire began to collapse and numerous Imperials fled to Corellia, still ruled by the pro-Imperial Diktat. This new situation gave a lot of power to Imperial liaison officers who felt free to threaten directly CorSec officers. Despite this context, CorSec officers Corran Horn and [[Iella Wessiri Antilles|Iella Wessiri]] collaborated with [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]'s [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] to [[Mission to Corellia (Rogue Squadron)|rescue]] [[Fyric Fel]], a child kidnapped by an [[Ilir Post|Imperial sympathizer]].''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Rogue Squadron: Family Ties]]'' Horn and Wessiri were then suspected of treachery by Imperial liaison Kirtan Loor. Thanks to the help of their superior, [[Gil Bastra]], they escaped Corellia and defected to the New Republic. Bastra was later killed by Kirtan Loor during his interrogation.''[[X-Wing: Wedge's Gamble]]'' In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the Corellian Security Force was dissolved upon order of [[Diktat]] [[Daclif Gallamby]]. Most of its resources and some of its personnel were allocated to the new Diktat-friendly [[Public Safety Service]]. ===Later history=== The Corellian Security Force had been reconstituted by the time of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], thanks to to intervention of the New Republic. However, the Corellians became more isolationist than ever during the war and eventually elected the nationalist [[Thrackan Sal-Solo]] as [[Governor-General]] of the Corellian system. Sal-Solo might have forced CorSec officers to collaborate with the [[Peace Brigade]], [[Yuuzhan Vong]] collaborators. Later during the Yuuzhan Vong War, in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]], the Jedi [[Tahiri Veila]], [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] and [[Anakin Solo]] gave a briefing about the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] to Corellian Security personnel.''[[The Essential Guide to Warfare]]'' In [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]], the Corellian system became a hotspot of the [[Second Galactic Civil War]]. CorSec forces were involved in intense figtings on Corellia as well as on [[Centerpoint Station]].''[[Star Wars: Legacy of the Force]]'' ==Appearances== {{ScrollBox|content= {{Mediacat|imagecat=Images
